description_long: This object is a delicate flowering plant with a slender green stem supporting a cluster of white petals and a central aggregation of small, pale blue florets. The flower is flanked by two large, ovate green leaves that are prominently veined and slightly serrated along the edges. The white petals are broad, slightly overlapping, and arranged in a roughly radial pattern around the central blue cluster. The central florets are much smaller and denser, creating a textured contrast to the smooth, flat petals. The overall appearance is airy and lightweight, with the leaves and petals spreading outward from the stem. This type of flower is commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or landscaped areas, adding a touch of natural beauty to the environment.
description: A delicate white and blue flower with broad, ovate green leaves and a slender stem, featuring a central cluster of small blue florets surrounded by larger white petals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of two large green leaves and the white petals radiating around the blue central florets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the flower cluster and the overlapping arrangement of petals, with one leaf partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the leaves and the underside of the flower, with the stem extending downward.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the vertical orientation of the stem and the layered arrangement of petals and leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial pattern around the central cluster of blue florets, with slight overlapping and a degree of symmetry typical of many ornamental flowers.
